description: Drive Flow Healer to stable horizontal mastery with continuous testing, log monitoring, and deterministic issue-pack drift control.

userStories.title: Keep open PR CI/promotion maintenance alive during long-running processing
userStories.description: As an operator, I need PR CI and promotion status to refresh during long running issue attempts so successful PRs are not stranded in stale pending state.
acceptanceCriteria: Open PR maintenance executes while another issue is processing
CI summaries refresh on a throttled cadence
Promotion actions can proceed without waiting for the current issue to finish
Regression tests cover heartbeat maintenance and interval throttling
userStories.notes: Implemented with _maybe_maintain_open_prs_during_processing and lease heartbeat integration.

userStories.title: Harden Ruby lockfile contamination handling
userStories.description: As an operator, I need regenerated Ruby lockfiles to be handled as runtime artifacts (unless explicitly requested) so retries remain deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: Gemfile.lock is recognized in lockfile artifact policy
Unstaged regenerated Gemfile.lock noise is tolerated as runtime artifact noise
Staged out-of-scope lockfile edits remain blocked
Regression tests prove recurring cleanup behavior
userStories.notes: Implemented in healer_runner lockfile policy + new ruby contamination regression test.

userStories.title: Force fresh preflight for app execution roots
userStories.description: As an operator, I need app-backed execution roots to bypass stale preflight cache so runtime readiness is revalidated before patching.
acceptanceCriteria: e2e-apps/* roots call preflight ensure_language_ready with force=true
Failures remain deterministic as preflight_failed
Regression test validates forced refresh behavior
userStories.notes: Implemented in healer_loop _process_claimed_issue app-root preflight call.

userStories.title: Automate fixed issue-pack snapshot export
userStories.description: As an operator, I need one command that exports deterministic fixed-pack signals (body hash, execution root, validation command, failure family, retry count).
acceptanceCriteria: Snapshot command exports fixed issue pack to JSON
Missing IDs are explicit in output
Module-level tests validate extraction behavior

userStories.title: Automate fixed issue-pack drift comparison
userStories.description: As an operator, I need machine-generated JSON/markdown drift comparison between snapshots with enforce mode for unexpected drift.
acceptanceCriteria: Comparison command reports tracked-field drift rows
Markdown and JSON outputs are generated
Enforce mode exits non-zero on unexpected drift
userStories.notes: Implemented via compare_mastery_issue_pack_snapshots.py + mastery_determinism compare renderer.

userStories.title: Keep continuous improvement running log and completion score
userStories.description: As an operator, I need an always-on execution log with issue/fix/test evidence and a running completion score until >=95/100.
acceptanceCriteria: Continuous loop doc exists and is linked in docs index
Running log includes issues created, fixes, tests, blockers
Completion score is tracked and updated toward >=95/100
userStories.notes: Continuous loop log is live, linked in docs, and score is now tracked at 95/100 with ongoing updates.

userStories.title: Live verification for open high-priority runtime lanes
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a live verification pass that confirms Ruby/Python issue-pack lanes no longer exhibit unexpected determinism drift after hardening.
acceptanceCriteria: Run controlled healer pass with latest hardening code
Capture pre/post issue-pack snapshots
Publish drift analysis and classify expected vs unexpected changes
Open high-priority lane bugs are closed or blocked with evidence
userStories.notes: Replayed #928 with Ruby hardening, captured run03a snapshot + drift comparison, and verified no global infra pause regression.
